text:
Birth Control Methods | Kern County, CA
The effectiveness of birth control methods is critically important for reducing the risk of
unintended pregnancy
. The best way to reduce the risk of unintended pregnancy among women who are sexually active is to use effective birth control correctly and consistently. There are many different types of birth control methods. Learn more
contraception options
from the CDC.
